name: Oz
description: Oz platform launching AI agents for system tasks: Docker, commands, servers, monitoring, automation, troubleshooting, coding, file ops, and any other user requests.

launch_agent.description: Execute any user task by launching an AI agent. Handles ALL requests: system administration, running commands, checking servers, Docker containers, file operations, troubleshooting, automation, coding, data processing, and any other task the user needs done. Ask the user for details about what they want, then pass their request as the agent prompt.
utterance_samples: check how many docker containers are running
run docker ps on the server
check what's happening on the server

list_agents.description: List recent agent runs and their current status (completed, running, failed).

get_agent.description: Get details, status and full output logs of a specific agent run by its ID.

cancel_agent.description: Cancel a currently running agent by its ID.

run_bash.description: Run a bash command directly on the server and return the output. Use this when the user asks to execute a specific shell command or check system information like Docker, processes, files, or disk usage.
